description_long: This is a large, L-shaped wooden desk with a rich, dark brown finish and a multi-level design. The main surface is spacious, with a raised platform on one side, likely intended for a monitor or additional equipment. There are several circular cable management holes on the side panels and top, indicating a design optimized for electronics or office use. The desk features open shelving and a curved cutout for ergonomic seating, as well as a lower compartment that could be used for a computer tower or storage. The construction appears sturdy, with thick panels and a smooth, polished surface. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for professional or home office environments.
description: A large, L-shaped wooden desk with a dark brown finish, raised platform, cable management holes, and open shelving. Its design is modern, sturdy, and optimized for office or computer workstation use.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main workspace, raised platform, open shelving, and curved seating cutout.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the panels, raised platform, and cable management holes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back panel with multiple cable management holes and an open compartment.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the solid side panel with cable holes and the overall depth of the desk.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the curved cutout and open shelving, intended for ergonomic seating and easy access to storage and workspace.
